headline: Nordson Corp (NASDAQ:NDSN) Passes Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with High ROIC and Strong Cash Flow
summary: Nordson Corp (NDSN) is analyzed against the Caviar Cruise quality investing screen, showing strong profitability, 43.80% ROIC, 10.71% EBIT growth, and excellent cash conversion, though its premium valuation warrants caution.
